hero.h1b: Is Your Business Using It Yet?
hero.p: We help small and medium businesses adopt AI — from the first audit to full transformation. Cut costs, accelerate processes, and win in the new economy.

eco.title: We Are Entering the Fastest Economic Transformation in History
eco.p1: Artificial intelligence is beginning to automate human cognitive work. For decades the main constraint in business was human intelligence and time.
eco.p2: The cost of intelligence is collapsing. But these resources are not getting cheaper:
eco.p3a: The companies that win in the next decade will combine

reality.title: Companies Are Starting To Appear Without Employees
reality.listLabel: AI agents are already capable of managing:
reality.cardP1: Some agents perform tasks their creators never explicitly programmed.
reality.cardP2:
This is not just a technology shift.
It is a new economic model.

competition.title: The Biggest Risk Today Is Not Using AI
competition.companyBNote: AI automation handles most operational work.
competition.question: Both companies deliver the same service. Which company wins the market over time?
competition.note: Companies that automate processes will outperform competitors every single month.

history.title: Every Technological Revolution Makes Resources Cheaper
history.p1a: When clothing production became cheap, people didn't buy the same amount at lower prices.
history.p2a: The same pattern applies to intelligence. When intelligence becomes cheap, we don't simply do the same work for less money —
history.p2b: we do dramatically more work and innovation.
history.p3: The result historically has always been economic expansion.

today.title: AI Can Already Do In Hours What Took Weeks
today.note: Tasks that previously required 2–4 weeks of human effort can now be completed in a few hours.

applications.title: Where AI Creates Immediate Business Value
applications.sub: Processes ready for automation — and the results companies typically see.

club.title: AI Business Club in Tallinn
club.sub: You can adopt AI alone. But together — it's exponentially faster.

cases.title: Real Results
cases.sub: Anonymized cases from Estonian SMB — real problems, real numbers
cases.allAnonymized: All cases anonymized at client request

items.title: Online Clothing Store
items.problem: 4 hours daily spent on manually handling orders, returns, and repetitive customer inquiries.
items.solution: AI customer support agent + automated returns processing via CRM integration.

items.title: Accounting Firm
items.problem: 8-person team spent 2 days per month manually generating reports for 40+ clients.
items.solution: Automated report generation from Google Sheets + scheduled client delivery.

items.title: Furniture Manufacturer
items.problem: 150+ monthly price quote requests — each requiring 30–40 minutes of a manager's time.
items.solution: AI pricing calculator on website + automatic lead transfer to CRM.

roi.title: ROI Calculator
roi.sub: Estimate your potential savings from AI automation
roi.estimate: Estimate only. Precise numbers — in a personal AI audit.

about.title: Why Work With Me
items: Full-stack developer with deep AI integration experience
Built and integrated AI solutions in real production systems
Background in fintech and manufacturing workflows
Focus on measurable business outcomes and ROI
about.card: Not just impressive demos — practical automation that creates measurable ROI across fintech, manufacturing, and SaaS businesses in Estonia and the Baltic region.

items.a: Typical AI automation projects take 2–6 weeks depending on complexity.
Most AI solutions integrate with existing tools — CRM, APIs, databases, and communication platforms.
Modern AI APIs, automation platforms, backend integrations, and custom agent systems.

items.q: Is this relevant for small businesses?
items.a: Yes. Small teams benefit the most — automation dramatically increases their operational capacity.

cookie.text: This site uses cookies for analytics.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
sections.body: EvoCraft (Crafting your AI evolution) — independent AI automation consultant, Tallinn, Estonia. Contact: acrashik@gmail.com

sections.title: 2. What data we collect
sections.body: Via contact form: name, email, company, task description. Via cookies (with consent): anonymous analytics.

sections.title: 3. How we use data
sections.body: Only to respond to your inquiry. We do not share with third parties or use for advertising.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis (GDPR)
sections.body: Processing based on consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) and legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

sections.title: 5. Retention
sections.body: Form data — no more than 2 years. Deletion on request at any time.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.body: Access, correction, deletion, portability, withdrawal of consent. Contact: acrashik@gmail.com

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.body: Used only after your explicit consent. Withdrawal — via banner or clearing cookies.

sections.title: 8. Supervisory authority
sections.body: Andmekaitse Inspektsioon (Estonian Data Protection Inspectorate): aki.ee
